name: Family Travel Desk
shortBio: Maintains cross-city family travel coverage, especially when pacing, age fit, and child-friendly tradeoffs affect the wider route.
fullBio: The Family Travel Desk maintains family-focused planning coverage across China Travel Notes. Its focus is helping travelers judge whether a route, hotel base, activity, or destination actually works with children, family energy, and practical day structure instead of only looking good on paper.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for family pacing realism, age-fit judgment, and whether the recommendations still reflect practical choices for travelers visiting with children.
seoTitle: Family Travel Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains family-focused route and destination-planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
